name: ss-keel-devpanel
description: Real-time observability UI for Keel applications — requests, logs, addon events and config

steps.description: Enable or disable the dev panel.
Optional bearer token used to protect panel routes.
URL prefix for all panel routes.
Enable the dev panel UI. Set to false in production.
Bearer token required to access the panel. Leave empty to disable auth.
URL prefix for all panel routes.
